name: supercalm
description: Supercalm — a remote operating system to drive CLI coding agents (claude/codex/agy) on a Tailscale node, with a voice/text web console

scripts.test: node test/static_path.test.js && node test/project_graph.test.js && node test/knowledge_assets.test.js && node test/supervisor_spec_files.test.js && node test/supervisor_progressive_scope.test.js && node test/supervisor_doc_lifecycle.test.js && node test/supervisor_awareness_guards.test.js && node test/product_audit.test.js && node test/external_recovery.test.js && node test/operator_requirements.test.js && node test/model_catalog_key.test.js && npm run test:supervisor-architecture && npm run test:supervisor-replay && npm run test:supervisor-doctrine && npm run test:supervisor-send-policy && npm run test:dispatch-guard && npm run test:thrash && npm run test:update-core && npm run test:supervisor-engagement && npm run test:project-memory && npm run test:task-state && npm run test:model-providers && npm run test:pricing && npm run test:phone && npm run test:voice-brief && node test/session_title.test.js && node test/browser_identity.test.js && node test/preview_profiles.test.js && npm run test:council && npm run test:agui
